BIOCHEMISTRY MAJOR

Program Director: Lee Friedman, Ph.D.

The study of molecular and atomic properties and interactions that encompass Chemistry and Biochemistry are central to many scientiﬁc disciplines including biology, geology, astronomy, environmental science, materials science and numerous others. Chemistry and Biochemistry majors continue to graduate or professional school, and obtain employment as educators and technical scientists. Courses offered by this department may be found under the following acronyms: BCHM, CHEM
